column3: Sweet Flag Extracts is a product derived from an herb known as Acorus Calamus, which contains various compounds that can provide different health benefits such as relieving digestive issues and boosting cognitive function when consumed in appropriate doses.

Sweet Flag Powders is a finely-milled, aromatic spice derived from the roots of a particular type of plant called Acorus Calamus, which possesses distinctively fragrant, yet mildly bitter and sweet flavors that can greatly enhance a wide variety of culinary dishes.

Sweet Flag Essential Oil is obtained by extraction process of plant material from the Acorus Calamus, a perennial herb which produces tall leafy stalks and has medicinal values and a distinct fragrance that resembles sweetness.

Sweet Flag Tinctures is a form of herbal medicine that uses an extract derived from the root of the sweet flag plant, primarily meant for the enhancement of health and general well-being, through the intake of small doses diluted in liquid mediums.
Sweet Flag Pills is a type of herbal remedy typically derived from the root and leaves of the Acorus calamus plant, which is also known as sweet sedge or calamus.

Sweet Flag Tea is a herbal drink made from the aromatic roots of a plant called Sweet Flag, also known as Calamus, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine and culinary purposes due to its unique flavor profile and various health benefits.

Sweet Flag Infusions is a concoction made by brewing extract from the aromatic roots and rhizomes of a particular type of herb called Sweet Flag, which results in a unique beverage that can be enjoyed for its soothing properties and delightful taste.

Sweet Flag Capsules is a natural health product, primarily made from Cyperus scariosus, an aromatic plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties such as relieving stomach aches and promoting digestion.

Sweet Flag Tablets is a herbal supplement derived from the dried, aromatic roots of an Asian plant called Acorus calamus, commonly known as sweet flag or calamus root, which are ground into powder and shaped into small tablets designed for easy consumption.

Sweet Flag Syrups is a type of flavorful syrup derived from the roots and rhizomes of a plant called Sweet Flag, which has been used for centuries for culinary and medicinal purposes due to its aromatic essence.
